# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
kind: KongCluster
metadata:
  name: my-kong
spec:
  admin_listen: "0.0.0.0:8001"
  admin_tls_certificate: /path/to/admin.crt
  admin_tls_key: /path/to/admin.key
  datacenter: DC1
  log_level: info
  kong_database:
    hosts:
      - host: localhost, port: 5432, user: myuser, password: mypassword, dbname: kong
  service:
    plugins:
      - name: kong-cors
      - name: limits
      - name: rate-limiting
    node_selector:
      app: kong
    resources:
      requests:
        cpu: 200m
        memory: 512Mi
      limits:
        cpu: 400m
        memory: 1Gi
    template:
      metadata:
        labels:
          app: kong
      spec:
        containers:
        - name: kong
          image: docker.io/kong:latest
          ports:
            - name: admin
              containerPort: 8001
            - name: dlb
              containerPort: 8443
            - name: lbs
              containerPort: 8000
          env:
            KONG_DATABASE_URL: postgres://myuser:mypassword@localhost:5432/kong?schema=ssl&sslmode=verify-full
            KONG_PROXY_LISTEN: "0.0.0.0:8000, ssl"
            KONG_ADMIN_LISTEN: "0.0.0.0:8001, ssl"
            KONG_DLB_LISTEN: "0.0.0.0:8443, ssl"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthy
              port: 8001
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthy
              port: 8001

apiVersion: autoscaling/v2beta2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: my-kong-hpa
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: kong.konghq.com/v1
    kind: KongCluster
    name: my-kong
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 5
  metrics:
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      target:
        type: Utilization
        averageUtilization: 70

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: api.myapp.com
    http:
      paths:
      - pathType: Prefix
        path: "/"
        backend:
          service:
            name: kong
            port:
              number: 8000
